interface: After a short gap, you may re-enter without restoring the previous rhythm.

audit.notes: Mechanism: brief absence weakens cue-driven automaticity, so immediate smoothness should not be required. Source: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889.

zh-TW.interface: 短暫中斷後，你可以回來，而不必立刻接回先前節奏。

zh-CN.interface: 短暂中断后，你可以回来，不必立刻接回先前的节奏。

ja.kernel: 連続性は失効していません。
ja.interface: 短い空白のあとでも、以前のリズムをすぐに再開しなくてかまいません。

design_rationale: Targets short-gap re-entry friction by removing the expectation of instant continuity, without repeating no-debt's backlog framing.

interface: After a month-scale gap, you may return without proving memory, skill, or narrative continuity.

audit.notes: Mechanism: disrupted context weakens habitual responding, so recall friction is normal rather than disqualifying. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

zh-TW.interface: 一個月量級的空白後，你可以回來，而不必證明記憶、熟練度或敘事連續。

zh-CN.interface: 一个月量级的空白后，你可以回来，不必证明记忆、熟练度或叙事连续。

ja.kernel: 記憶は部分的でかまいません。
ja.interface: 一か月規模の空白のあとでも、記憶や腕前や物語の連続を証明しなくてかまいません。

design_rationale: Shifts the permission from historical absolution to partial recall tolerance, which is more specific to a month-long absence.

interface: After several months away, you may treat this as a new contact instead of a resumed streak.

audit.notes: Mechanism: longer context discontinuity breaks old cue chains, making a fresh-contact frame more accurate than seamless continuation. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

zh-TW.interface: 幾個月未碰後，你可以把這次視為新的接觸，而不是延續中的連續紀錄。

zh-CN.interface: 几个月未碰后，你可以把这次视为新的接触，而不是延续中的连续记录。

ja.kernel: 再入は新規でもかまいません。
ja.interface: 数か月離れていたあとでも、今回は継続の再開ではなく、新しい接触として扱ってかまいません。

design_rationale: At quarter-scale absence, the permission needed is freshness rather than continuity; this avoids guilt while staying about elapsed time.

interface: After half a year away, you may enter without matching the tempo, plans, or competence from before.

audit.notes: Mechanism: old automaticity and contextual fluency decay across long gaps; lowering restart pressure also avoids guilt-reactivity after lapses. Sources: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889; Thogersen-Ntoumani et al., Br J Health Psychol 2021, PMCID: PMC8451927.

zh-TW.interface: 半年未碰後，你可以進入，而不必符合從前的速度、計畫或熟練狀態。

zh-CN.interface: 半年未碰后，你可以进入，不必符合从前的速度、计划或熟练状态。

ja.kernel: 以前のペースは解除されています。
ja.interface: 半年離れていたあとでも、以前の速度や計画や習熟度に合わせなくてかまいません。

design_rationale: Half-year absence calls for release from prior pace and competence expectations, not a generic debt reset.

interface: After a year or more, you may approach this title without inheriting the standards of your earlier self.

audit.notes: Mechanism: extended discontinuity weakens old habit-context links enough that identity continuity should not be assumed. Source: Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

zh-TW.interface: 一年以上後，你可以接近這款遊戲，而不必承接較早那個自己的標準。

zh-CN.interface: 一年以上后，你可以接近这款游戏，不必继承更早那个自己的标准。

ja.kernel: 以前の自己像は必須ではありません。
ja.interface: 一年以上たっていても、以前の自分の基準を引き継がずにこの作品へ戻ってかまいません。

design_rationale: Year-scale absence shifts the problem from pace to identity; the permission removes obligation to be the same player as before.

interface: When no last-played record exists, you may begin without reconstructing history, sequence, or proof of prior use.

audit.notes: Mechanism: missing telemetry functions like context discontinuity, so proof of continuity should not be demanded. Sources: Stojanovic et al., Front Psychol 2022, PMCID: PMC9226889; Thomas et al., PLoS One 2016, PMCID: PMC4847906.

zh-TW.interface: 當沒有 last-played 記錄時，你可以開始，而不必重建歷史、順序或曾經使用的證明。

zh-CN.interface: 当没有 last-played 记录时，你可以开始，不必重建历史、顺序或先前使用的证明。

ja.kernel: 連続記録がなくてもかまいません。
ja.interface: last-played の記録がない場合でも、履歴や順序や以前使っていた証拠を再構成しなくてかまいません。

design_rationale: Designed for absent telemetry rather than elapsed time: permission focuses on missing continuity evidence, not on past inactivity as debt.

interface: After a once-anchored period ended in long absence, you may return without reactivating the old level of investment.

audit.notes: Mechanism: burnout is marked by exhaustion, distance, and reduced efficacy; permission removes pressure to resume prior intensity, while self-compassion is inversely associated with burnout. Sources: WHO ICD-11 burn-out FAQ; Hashem & Zeinoun, Mindfulness 2020, PMCID: PMC7481342.

zh-TW.interface: 在曾經深度投入又長時間離開之後，你可以回來，而不必重新啟動舊有投入程度。

zh-CN.interface: 在曾经深度投入又长时间离开之后，你可以回来，不必重新启动旧有投入程度。

ja.kernel: 以前の強度は再現不要です。
ja.interface: 以前に深く結び付いていて、その後長く離れていた場合でも、元の投入度を再起動しなくてかまいません。

design_rationale: This is the only absence case anchored in overload recovery: it grants distance from former intensity, not relief from backlog or skill expectations.
